name: Fruity Vimto Ice Lollies
raw_ingredients: Add water and a scoop of Vimto® Clear Whey to a shaker.
Shake well and then let the drink stand for 15 seconds to allow the froth to settle.
Add your fruit to the popsicle moulds.
Pour the Clear Whey into the moulds, add the sticks and freeze for at least 4 hours or overnight.
